reason: Verified that the agent can successfully open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report back the result.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agents list in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260611-194452-a8gu" in sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface and empty message input
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into chat input — Message was entered into the textbox successfully
Clicked Send button to send the message — Message was sent and agent began processing (status changed to "working")
Waited up to 180 seconds for response containing "Example Domain" — Agent successfully completed task within timeout period

Took final screenshot to verify response — Screenshot confirms agent's response includes the text "The page title is "Example Domain". Browser closed." along with all browser tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) that were executed successfully
